Off Calendar Oct-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Economy Restaurant Fixtures' motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turnover order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Economy Restaurant Fixtures's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
